race.comment: MCTOMINAY (4) stalked the good speed when up in trip for a well deserved win over this track and trip. Up slightly in weight and looks to find a winnable race again. BRASS MONKEYS (7) lightly raced gelding who can go on with it this time in. Strong through the line when third over 1200m at Goulburn first-up. Gets a better set-up today and shapes as the main danger. JASKIER (1) resumes after going out for a spell with a respectable fifth over 1200m here last December in BM66 grade. Maps well and adept in all conditions. CARIBBEAN VILLA (8) returned with a bang when leading the whole way at Horsham to shed his maiden tag. Less effective in his last two but is worth keeping safe on the short turnaround.
